Book Now

Serena Hotel

Family-run hotel inside an Olive grove

The 3-star family hotel Serena, in the holiday resort of Moraitika regularly achieves a high level of customer satisfaction and offers a good price-performance ratio.
You can expect freshly prepared food and Greek specialties every day. The family atmosphere rounds off the perfect holiday in Serena.

Rooms

The cozy 3-star facility comprises 28 rooms in three separate buildings. Every room is equipped a balcony and are fitted with air conditioning & a flat-screen TV.

View More

Restaurant

with a beautiful terrace

One of the authentic, cultural elements of a region is gastronomy, which is our top priority. Our typical Greek cuisine offers you a delicious selection of dishes from Greece and the Corfu region. Enjoy your meals in a relaxed atmosphere.

Restaurant

with a beautiful terrace

One of the authentic, cultural elements of a region is gastronomy, which is our top priority. Our typical Greek cuisine offers you a delicious selection of dishes from Greece and the Corfu region. Enjoy your meals in a relaxed atmosphere.

Pool Bar

with deck chairs and umbrellas

The cafe bar invites all guests for a cocktail or a light wine.
At the evening,we create a relaxing atmosphere by the pool area with various spirits, wines and signature cocktails.

Pool Bar

with deck chairs and umbrellas

The cafe bar invites all guests for a cocktail or a light wine. At the evening,we create a relaxing atmosphere by the pool area with various spirits, wines and signature cocktails.

More Reviews

Location

The Hotel Serena is surrounded by Olive Grove. Due to the location you can enjoy the authentic Greek nature. The center of Moraitika with restaurants, bars and small shops for strolling can be reached after 30 meters walk. Relax on the wonderful, gently sloping beach, which is around 300 m from the hotel. A transfer bus takes you from the airport to the hotel in around 30 to 50 minutes.
